name: Windows Logon Reminder Usage as Launcher
description: Detects the use of wlrmdr.exe to launch other executables, a technique used to bypass security restrictions.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'wlrmdr.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the wlrmdr.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute wlrmdr.exe, including any suspicious flags like -s, -f, -t, -m, -a, -u.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which wlrmdr.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that launched wlrmdr.exe (should not be winlogon.exe).
